conservative.name: For the Glory of Tzeentch!
conservative.requirements:
Used By: Broken Wheel Leader
Engaged with Target

success.description: The Broken Wheel Leader rallies his followers to assault the cult's enemies. The attack inflicts normal damage
As above, and all enemies engaged with one or more members of the Cult of the Broken Wheel suffer 1 wound

boon.description: All enemies engaged with one or more members of the Cult of the Broken Wheel suffer 1 stress

chaosStar.description: All members of the Cult of the Broken Wheel in close range (including the attacker) suffer 1 wound

success.description: Your vicious attack is an inspiration to your followers. The attack inflicts normal damage
As above, an all enemies engaged with one or more of your allies suffer 1 wound

boon.description: All enemies engaged with one or more members of the Cult of the Broken Wheel suffer 1 stress

chaosStar.description: One of your minions is overcome with his devotion to your dark god, and becomes a mindless, empty, gibbering shell

sigmarsComet.description: One enemy engaged with one of your allies suffers a critical wound
